message:
feat(connectors): migrate 12 connector retry loops to centralized RetryLoop

Replace hand-rolled retry/backoff loops with RetryLoop::execute() from
fcp-sdk in airtable, browser, figma, google-ai, linear, microsoft365,
plaid, telegram, twilio, twitter, youtube, and zendesk connectors.

Each connector now yields AttemptOutcome::{Success, Retryable, Terminal}
instead of manually sleeping, incrementing counters, and tracking last_err.
This gives uniform jittered exponential backoff, cancellation-aware
sleeping via request_context(), and structured retry telemetry.

Linear additionally gains Retry-After header parsing and
remaining_budget() checks so rate-limit waits exceeding the request's
time budget surface immediately as terminal errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
